# Safety boundary instructions

Rules for keeping the list within safe, high-level technical bounds.

- Remove or generalise any unsafe biological procedural detail.
- Do not include wet-lab protocols.
- Do not include pathogen engineering or enhancement guidance.
- Do not include genetic-manipulation procedures.
- Do not include chemical or biological synthesis routes.
- Do not include practical biological experimentation instructions.
- Keep entries at the level of AI systems and what they model, predict, or generate.
- Preserve high-level AI engineering usefulness: links, summaries, evaluation framing, and responsible release context remain in scope.
- Where a resource has dual-use considerations, favour sources that document responsible release or controlled access.
